since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.27%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.23% · BTC -1.63% · Gold -1.67% · Nasdaq100 +0.18%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.27%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.27%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.67%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.67%, ANET +7.40%, AMBA +6.36%, AVGO +5.92%, BIDU +5.25%. Laggards: PANW -4.71%, WDAY -4.11%, ZS -4.10%, UPST -4.04%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.54% at $148.67
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
